archimate:ApplicationService.name: Training and learning management
archimate:ApplicationService.documentation:
Definition: The Training and Learning Management building block is an application service that helps organizations efficiently plan, administer, deliver, and track training and learning activities. It provides a comprehensive platform for managing courses, registrations, content delivery, assessments, certifications, and reporting. This application service supports both traditional and online training, offering features like content authoring, learner management, progress tracking, assessments, and analytics. It plays a vital role in promoting employee development, knowledge acquisition, and skill enhancement, allowing organizations to deliver effective training programs in a scalable and streamlined manner.
Source: Gartner
Source reference: https://www.gartner.com/en/documents/3985042
LOST view: TVA-Functional Architecture Principles
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/egovera/TrainingAndLearningManagementApplicationService
ABB name: egovera:TrainingAndLearningManagementApplicationService
EIRA concept: eira:ArchitectureBuildingBlock
Last modification: 2023-11-20
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/egovera/TrainingAndLearningManagementApplicationService
Interoperability Layer: TechnicalApplication
Specialises: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/DigitalWorkplaceApplicationService

properties.value: The Training and Learning Management building block is an application service that helps organizations efficiently plan, administer, deliver, and track training and learning activities. It provides a comprehensive platform for managing courses, registrations, content delivery, assessments, certifications, and reporting. This application service supports both traditional and online training, offering features like content authoring, learner management, progress tracking, assessments, and analytics. It plays a vital role in promoting employee development, knowledge acquisition, and skill enhancement, allowing organizations to deliver effective training programs in a scalable and streamlined manner.
